//: Phase H (PHASE-H-PER-PACKAGE-COMPILE.md §3.1) — shared per-package emit config.
//1: Each Tier-1/Tier-2 workspace package adds its own tsconfig.build.json that
//2: extends THIS file via the relative path '../tsconfig.build.template.json'.
//3: Authoring + tests stay driven by each package's tsconfig.json (noEmit:true).
//4: NOTE — `outDir` and `rootDir` are deliberately OMITTED here.  TypeScript
//5: resolves path-options relative to the file that DEFINES them, so writing
//7: package MUST set its own `outDir: ./dist` and `rootDir: ./src` overrides.
//8: DESIGN CHOICE — the compilerOptions below mirror tsconfig.base.json so that
//9: adding a tsconfig.build.json to an existing package does NOT also impose a
//11: verbatimModuleSyntax:true).  Tightening those is its own opt-in pass.
